title: Review: search tab feature
description: Review the complete diff across APIClient.swift, SearchView.swift, AppRoot.swift, and SearchArticlesTests.swift. Check: no hardcoded hex colors, GlassEffectContainer present, SF Symbols used, Dynamic Type respected, all five UI states reachable, debounce guard prevents empty-query network calls, cursor pagination uses committedQuery (not live query), no sort/view/unread_only params leak into the request, accessibility labels on interactive elements.
acceptance_criteria: No semantic or behavioral regressions identified
All UI conventions from CLAUDE.md are satisfied (Liquid Glass, SF Symbols, semantic colors, Dynamic Type)
All five required states (Idle, Loading, Empty, Error, Not Configured) confirmed present
Empty-query guard and committed-query pagination logic verified correct
No sort/view/unread_only params present in searchArticles
Accessibility labels present on interactive elements
